# Tanner Chiropractic

> Integrated chiropractic, sports medicine, acupuncture, and golf performance care in North Scottsdale, Arizona. Dr. Glen J. Tanner, D.C., C.C.S.M.S., TPI Certified.

Tanner Chiropractic is a private practice in North Scottsdale, Arizona owned and operated by Dr. Glen J. Tanner. Dr. Tanner is a graduate of Palmer College of Chiropractic West with post-graduate certification in Sports Rehabilitation and Physiotherapy from the University of Bridgeport. He has been in practice for over 30 years and has served as physician and corner man for multiple world champion boxers through Top Rank Boxing (17 years) and as physician for PGA professionals. He is TPI Certified at Levels 1 and 2 and developed the Golfer's Edge performance and injury-prevention program for the Desert Mountain Golf Community. He has been voted one of Arizona's Top 10 Best Chiropractors and has 179+ five-star patient reviews across Google, Facebook, and Birdeye.

## Who we serve

- Active adults 50+ in North Scottsdale, Carefree, Cave Creek, and surrounding North Valley communities including Troon, Grayhawk, DC Ranch, Desert Mountain, Pinnacle Peak, and Terravita.
- Golfers (recreational and professional) seeking both injury treatment and swing-related performance work.
- Athletes and weekend warriors with sports and overuse injuries.
- Patients considering surgery who want to explore non-surgical options first (especially via shock wave therapy).

## Services

- Chiropractic Care
- Sports Injury Treatment
- Acupuncture
- Shock Wave Therapy (one of the few chiropractic clinics in the Valley offering this)
- Spinal Decompression
- Cold Laser Therapy
- Corrective Exercise & Rehabilitation
- Clinical Pilates
- Therapeutic Massage
- TPI Golf Performance & Injury Prevention (Golfer's Edge program)

## Conditions we treat

Lower back pain, sciatica, neck pain, migraines, shoulder and rotator cuff pain, knee and IT band pain, golf injury and swing-related dysfunction, sports and overuse injuries, postural and desk-job pain, post-surgical recovery.

## What makes us different

Most chiropractic offices offer adjustments and refer out for everything else. Tanner Chiropractic keeps ten coordinated services under one roof, run by one doctor who knows what the others did. Adjustments address the immediate restriction; corrective exercise, acupuncture, shock wave, decompression, laser, and Pilates address the muscle imbalances, postural dysfunction, and movement patterns that caused the problem.

## Practice details

- **Phone:** (480) 595-6101 (answered in person Mon–Fri during office hours)
- **Address:** 33755 N. Scottsdale Rd, Suite 101G, Scottsdale, AZ 85266
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 7:00am–12:00pm and 2:00pm–6:00pm. Closed Saturday and Sunday.
- **New patient exam:** $49 (full evaluation, movement screen, and written treatment plan)
- **Website:** https://tannerchiropractic.com

## Condition detail pages

- [Lower Back Pain](https://tannerchiropractic.com/lower-back-pain.html) — disc, facet, SI joint, core weakness, hip mobility causes; treated with adjustments, spinal decompression, soft tissue, corrective exercise, shock wave (for stubborn tendon attachments), clinical Pilates.
- [Sciatica](https://tannerchiropractic.com/sciatica.html) — caused by disc herniation, piriformis syndrome, SI joint dysfunction, or lumbar facet irritation. Treated with spinal decompression for disc cases, soft tissue and trigger point for piriformis, adjustments for joint cases, cold laser for inflammation, corrective exercise for the cause.
- [Neck Pain &amp; Migraines](https://tannerchiropractic.com/neck-pain.html) — forward head posture, whiplash, cervicogenic headache, cervical radiculopathy. Treated with cervical/thoracic adjustment, acupuncture (especially for tension headaches and migraines), soft tissue, cervical decompression for radiculopathy, postural retraining.
- [Shoulder &amp; Rotator Cuff Pain](https://tannerchiropractic.com/shoulder-pain.html) — rotator cuff strain, impingement, frozen shoulder, AC joint, biceps tendinitis, referred from neck. Treated with thoracic/shoulder adjustment, shock wave therapy (often avoids surgery for chronic tendinopathy), massage, cold laser, acupuncture, rotator cuff and scapular rehab.
- [Golf Injury &amp; Swing Correction](https://tannerchiropractic.com/golf-injury.html) — Dr. Tanner is TPI Certified Level 1 and 2, developed the Golfer's Edge program at Desert Mountain, and has served as physician for PGA professionals. Treats lumbar, hip, shoulder, elbow, wrist, and knee injuries common to golfers, plus the underlying swing fault and body limitations.
